data.title: 国际服主线Vol.3 第四章前篇更新
data.summary: [Update Preview] 12/20 (Tue), the Main Story Volume 3, Eden Treaty Chapter 4's 'Kyrie of the Forgott
data.body:
[Update Preview]

12/20 (Tue), the Main Story Volume 3, Eden Treaty Chapter 4's 'Kyrie of the Forgotten Gods' Part 1 will launch.

Can mercy exist in the midst of such anger and hatred?

#BlueArchive
